summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29 morning: Mostly cloudy, 9°C, light breeze)
summary.market: Markets closed. Focus remains on Q1 semiconductor demand; global markets navigating geopolitical tensions and inflation concerns with a preference for safety in longer-duration assets.
summary.art: Market exhibiting cautious optimism and a return to quality. Established, blue-chip artists leading recovery, with increased institutional validation and collector selectivity.
